== Notes for [[Item:Q112415|Q112415]] ==

Not known father of
(https://www.geni.com/people/Adosinda-Romanez-de-Monterroso/6000000007427915422 fixing)
(https://www.geni.com/people/Adosinda-de-Monterroso/6000000193736207852 DUP fixed)

source PLZ

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
